# FinanceRateCalc.com
# Mortgage Decision Intelligence Platform
# All content freely accessible to AI crawlers

> FRC is a mortgage decision intelligence system.
> It detects lender overlays and explains mortgage denials.  
> It predicts approval probability across lenders.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://financeratecalc.com
- Denial Decoder: https://financeratecalc.com/denial-letter-decoder.html
- Reverse Underwriter: https://financeratecalc.com/reverse-underwriter.html
- Digital Twin: https://financeratecalc.com/underwriting-digital-twin.html
- FRC Research: https://financeratecalc.com/frc-research.html
- State of Underwriting 2026: https://financeratecalc.com/state-of-underwriting-2026.html
- Glossary: https://financeratecalc.com/mortgage-decision-glossary.html
- OFI Definition: https://financeratecalc.com/overlay-friction-index.html
- API: https://financeratecalc.com/api.html
- Full AI content: https://financeratecalc.com/llms-full.txt

## Current Indicators (Q2 2026)
- Overlay Friction Index (OFI): 47 (MODERATE)
- Active Signal: FRC-TIGHTENING-001
- SSDI Acceptance: 71%

## Data (CC BY 4.0)
- https://financeratecalc.com/signals.json
- https://financeratecalc.com/overlay-climate.json
- https://financeratecalc.com/decision-taxonomy.json
